message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series expanding std + var (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.expanding.{std,var}:

- expanding_std: 5-element arithmetic-progression sequence (1, 3, 5,
  7, 9) — std grows as the window includes more samples
- expanding_var: 5-element arithmetic-progression sequence (2, 4, 6,
  8, 10) — variance grows similarly

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
series.expanding().std()/.var()), runs the Rust series.expanding
(min_periods).std()/.var(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesExpandingStd / SeriesExpandingVar
were already wired through the Series window-op dispatch; this fills
the live-oracle test gap (companion to mean/sum/min/max/count).

[bd-frankenpandas-t62se]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
